name: TJ Hess ~ Echo: Beyond Canon
description:
"I guess what I’m trying to say is... I kinda missed this place."

={ 🎨 Credits 🎨 }=

Wonderful artwork by monopoly360!

Look at this beautiful boy. It is non-negotiable. You WILL look at the beautiful boy.

={ 🗣️ Yappuccino 🗣️ }=

The Best BoyTM is here. It's Time.

I initially planned on making this one a lot more angsty, but it didn't seem right for TJ, so I ended up using all that for the Cam remake. It fit way better there anyway. Oh yeah, did I mention that I'm remaking Cam? I don't think I mentioned that I'm remaking Cam.

This is a timeskip of sorts. I guess. You're back to who you were in the Leo bot, but now it's assumed you've made friends with him and (at least) TJ too at this point. Can't have all of these being "You meet X character for the first time." Maybe if I ever end up wrapping this series, I'll update everything with a timeline.

I've been in a pretty depressed slump lately so I'm channeling all my lack of energy into this. Writing a bunch of bullcrap that barely anyone will see or care about is a good enough distraction. Though this may reflect negatively in its quality. So... sorry in advance. Again.

Other than that, has anyone else notices how weird JLLM has been acting lately? Like it's a whole new model. Sometimes it's better than it used to be, but mostly, it just forgets punctuation or breaks altogether. That's a bit annoying.

={ ✨ Updates ✨ }=

Any updates made will be logged here.
